# Virtual Environments
venv/
env/
py312env/
ENV/
env.bak/
venv.bak/

# Python cache
__pycache__/
*.py[cod]
*$py.class

# Distribution / packaging
*.egg-info/
dist/
build/
*.egg

# IDE / Editor files
.vscode/
.idea/
*.swp
*.swo

# OS generated files
.DS_Store
.DS_Store?
Thumbs.db

# Large data files (optional - remove if you want to track your CSV/images)
*.zip

# Logs
*.log
